BRITISH SCHOOL PORTAL - EDUCATIONAL CONSULTANCY SERVICE
British School Portal - Educational Consultancy Service
1
Consultant Description
Choosing the right school in the UK can be a daunting task, but it doesn't have to be.

BS Portal is your one-stop shop for all your educational needs. Our experienced consultants are on hand to provide you with personalised advice and guidance.

Get in touch with us today by filling out our ENQUIRY FORM or sending us a message on WhatsApp.

1. Visit www.britishschoolportal.co.uk/en/register
2. Choose "Educational Consultant Account"
3. Fill in the information and upload required documents
4. Read the "Terms and Conditions of use" and "Private Policy"
5. Kick "Apply" and then follow the instructions
